subtitle: Review sequencing, dependency realism, and blockers before task breakdown hardens around the plan.

sections.title: Implementation Streams and Sequencing
sections.label: Execution Stream
sections.why: Lead with the sequencing shape of the plan before deep dependency review.

sections.title: Dependency and Ownership View
sections.label: Dependency
sections.why: Use a matrix when ownership and ordering pressure need side-by-side review.

sections.title: Execution Slices and Checkpoints
sections.label: Execution Slice
sections.why: Keep planned execution slices dense and reviewable.

sections.title: Decisions Required for Approval
sections.label: Decision Gate
sections.why: Frame approval as explicit readiness checks before task generation.

sections.title: Blockers and TODO: Confirm Items
sections.label: Blocker
sections.why: Keep blockers and uncertain sequencing assumptions in view.

sections.title: Traceability Map
sections.label: Evidence
sections.why: Tie substantive approval claims to exact canonical evidence.

sections.title: Validator Status
sections.label: Validation
sections.why: Show canonical and approval-view validation status together.

sections.title: Downstream Impact if Approved
sections.label: Impact
sections.why: Clarify what downstream work may now treat as fixed.

glance_cards.label: Streams
glance_cards.hint: Execution streams or sequence steps under review.

glance_cards.label: Slices
glance_cards.hint: Execution slices or checkpoints in play.

glance_cards.label: Blockers
glance_cards.hint: Blockers or TODO: Confirm pressure points.

glance_cards.label: Evidence claims
glance_cards.hint: Claims backed by exact plan quotes.
